title: Xert SMART Threshold
description: Strain-based threshold intervals — power decreases as fatigue accumulates
purpose: Threshold work with fatigue-managed power targets

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/4. 70% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 10:00 at 70%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 70%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/4. 10:00 at threshold. Get comfortable being uncomfortable.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First threshold block. 100-100% FTP. Settle in — don't overcook the start.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Starting threshold work. This is the bread and butter of cycling fitness. Embrace it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/4. 10:00 in the space between 'fine' and 'please make it stop.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: First threshold block. 10:00 at 100-100%. Smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/4. 55% FTP, Seated. 4:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 4:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Set 2: 10:00 at 98%. Sweet spot? Nothing sweet. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 2/4. 34% complete. Hold 98% steady. 36 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your body knows what to do at threshold. Trust your fitness. Block 2/4.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 2/4. This is fine. Everything is fine. (Narrator: nothing was fine.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 2/4. 98% FTP, 82-90 rpm. Challenging but sustainable.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 55% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 48% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 4:00. Then 32min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 4:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 54% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 22 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 38 minutes in. 96% at 75-85 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 54% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 1 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 54% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 54% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 96%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 68% done. 0 intervals left. 18 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 30min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 68% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 68% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 4:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last threshold block. 94% FTP. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 8:00 at 94%. Then 10min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 10min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting threshold work. Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain.' (It doesn't, but it should.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last threshold interval. 94% FTP, 95-105 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 85% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 85% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 85% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 85% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
